title: FoF Filter Feed
description: Configuration for a content-filtering feed (filter.fof). The source feed lives in a 'source/' subdirectory.

id.description: Local identifier for this feed (used as directory name).

purge_age.description: Age after which articles are purged from the local cache. Same format as max_age.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last configuration update. Managed automatically by FoF.

criteria.description: List of filter criteria. ALL criteria must pass for an article to be included.

filter_type.description:
Type of filter to apply:
- title_regex: match article title against a regex
- content_regex: match article body against a regex
- link_regex: match article URL against a regex
- author: match article author name

pattern.description: Regex pattern (for *_regex types) or exact author name (for author type).

is_inclusion.description: If true (default), the article MUST match the pattern to pass. If false, the article must NOT match the pattern.
